cases.name: bootstrap-open-anonymous-state
cases.description: Opening an empty users database creates local runtime metadata, source state, triggers, and clean singleton rows.

cases.name: bootstrap-attached-started-empty
cases.description: Attaching an empty users database persists attached lifecycle state without dirty rows or outbox rows.

cases.name: prepared-outbox-freeze
cases.description: A pre-commit transient failure freezes the prepared outbox, drains dirty rows, and leaves the source bundle floor unchanged.

cases.name: committed-remote-after-fetch-failure
cases.description: A commit-before-fetch failure persists committed_remote outbox state for replay.

cases.name: committed-replay-accept-drains-uploaded-intent
cases.description: A successful committed replay clears uploaded dirty intent, clears outbox rows, and advances source/checkpoint state.

cases.name: committed-replay-preserve-local-rebase
cases.description: A committed_remote replay preserves a newer local delete, rebases it onto the committed row version, and drains it on a follow-up push.

cases.name: pull-checkpoint-advance
cases.description: Pulling one remote users bundle advances the local checkpoint and records authoritative row state.

cases.name: source-recovery-gate-persisted
cases.description: A source recovery response persists the rebuild/source-recovery gate and the gate survives a new client over the same database.
